title: Bubble Mania Bubble Machine - Bubble Blower Whale For Kids - Automatic Bubble Maker Machine
features: INSTANT BUBBLES FOR KIDS WITH THE BUBBLE WHALE - Create tons of bubbles and unlike most bubble machines, the Bubble Blower shoots bubbles upwards, just like a real whale!
VERY EASY TO USE - Simply add bubble solution and press the push button on the side. The air will be filled with hundreds of bubbles for kids, in a matter of seconds.
SPEND LESS TIME FILLING IT UP - The extra large bubble reservoir on the Bubble Whale means less time filling it up, and more time catching bubbles!
INCLUDES FREE BUBBLE TUB - With a jumbo 8 fl oz bubble solution tub you can get making bubbles right away with this automatic battery operated bubble machine
FUN WHALE DESIGN AND BRIGHT COLOURS - The Bubble Whale is fun to use, as well as strong, sturdy and built to last
description: Product Description Previous page Next page 1 High Performance Bubbles! 2 Extra Large Reservoir! 3 100% Non-Toxic Bubble Previous page Next page 1 Pour 2 Press 3 Enjoy! Previous page Next page 1 Make Your Bubble Solution 2 Make Thousands of Bubbles 3 100% Fun and Safe Education Objective(s) Literacy & Spatial Awareness: Our Bubble Whale is more than just fun! It sparks little imaginations for storytelling and helps kids understand space as they chase and pop bubbles. Perfect for playful learning! Care Instructions Easy peasy! Just give your Bubble Whale a quick wipe with a dry cloth to keep it clean. Remember, keep it dry around the battery area to keep the bubble magic going! Material Types: We've used 100% non-toxic, super safe plastic. So, while the kids are having a blast with bubbles, you can relax knowing they're playing safe. What is the fill capacity? With a fill capacity of 8 fl oz, your Bubble Whale will keep the bubble party going for ages! Just fill it up and watch the endless stream of bubbly fun! Can I buy more liquid? While we don't sell bubble liquid, no worries! You can easily find other bubble solutions in stores. Plus, we've got a cool DIY bubble recipe just above this section – super easy and loads of fun to make with the kids!
